data.description: Trump: We’re not going to let Iran toll the Strait

WSJ: Iran still has thousands of ballistic missiles in its arsenal that it could use by retrieving launchers from underground storage areas, according to American officials familiar with U.S. intelligence assessments.

Iran has been unable to fully open the Strait of Hormuz because it 'cannot locate all of the mines it laid in the waterway' and currently 'lacks the capability to remove them', according to New York Times report.
New York Times on officials: Iran lacks the capability to remove some mines in the Strait of Hormuz

data.title: Labor and Community Leaders Kick-Off Oakland's Yes on Measure E Campaign to Protect Essential Services & Keep Fire Stations Open
data.description: In Oakland, California on April 10, 2026, a coalition of labor groups from IFPTE Local 21, Oakland Firefighters, SEIU Local 1021, Alameda Labor Council, and community leaders will begin the Yes on Measure E campaign. This initiative aims to maintain the operation of fire stations throughout the city. The campaign will commence this Saturday with a citywide canvassing launch.

data.title: AI cybersecurity attacks expected to rise in next 2 years: Anthropic issues security guidelines as Project Glasswing unveils AI models detecting vulnerabilities faster than humans.
data.description: Anthropic has issued new security guidelines in response to the latest developments from Project Glasswing, where frontier AI models have demonstrated the ability to detect and exploit vulnerabilities at a faster rate than human defenders. This advancement highlights the importance of staying vigilant and implementing robust cybersecurity measures to protect sensitive data and networks. The emergence of AI technology with the capability to outpace traditional defense mechanisms underscores the need for continuous innovation in cybersecurity practices. It is essential for organizations to adapt to these evolving threats by enhancing their security protocols and defenses.

data.title: Bank executives cautioned by Treasury secretary and Federal Reserve chair about cyberthreats from Anthropic's new, powerful A.I. technology.
data.description: The Treasury secretary and the Federal Reserve chair held a meeting with bank executives to address the growing cyberthreats from artificial intelligence. The meeting was an uncommon step aimed at emphasizing the potential risks associated with AI. This discussion involved key stakeholders in the banking sector and highlighted the need for increased vigilance. No specific details were provided on the number of executives present or the exact nature of the cyberthreats discussed. Overall, the meeting underscored the importance of staying vigilant in the face of evolving technological challenges.

data.title: Pilgrim’s Pride Corporation Announces Early Tender Results for up to $250 Million Aggregate Principal Amount of Its Outstanding 6.250% Senior Notes Due 2033
data.description: On April 10, 2026, in Greeley, Colorado, Pilgrim’s Pride Corporation (NASDAQ: PPC) revealed details about its recent cash tender offer, aiming for an aggregate principal amount of $250 million for its 6.250% Senior Notes due 2033. The company referred to this as the Maximum Tender Amount.

data.title: Construction-Stage Producers Race to Capture the Supply Gap as Gold Prices Approach $4,700
data.description: Companies involved in the construction-stage gold production sector are seen as having the most advantageous leverage to the current gold price of around $4,700 per ounce. Among these companies are LVG, AGI, SKE, LGDTF, and RVLGF. This information was shared by Lake Victoria Gold Ltd. In Vancouver, BC, the news was issued on April 10, 2026. The article, published on USANewsGroup.com, emphasizes how these specific companies stand to benefit from the high price of gold.

data.title: AYR Wellness Announces Closing of Exit Facility and Related Transactions
data.description: On April 10, 2026, AYR Wellness Inc. disclosed the initial completion of transferring its Virginia operations to Arboretum Virginia LLC, a subsidiary of Arboretum Bidco LLC. AYR, a prominent U.S. multi-state cannabis operator, also finalized the funding for its new money exit facility with Arboretum as part of its restructuring transactions. Arboretum, set to do business as "Ayr Wellness," was formed by the company's senior secured noteholders as the buyer specified in the Master Purchase Agreement from November 14, 2025. Further acquisitions of state-level operations are in the pipeline for transfer to Arboretum pending regulatory approvals. This milestone represents the first state-specific closing under the Master Purchase Agreement. The company's stock is listed as CSE: AYR.A and OTCQX: AYRWF.

data.title: Lomiko Metals Announces Management Change
data.description: In Montreal, Lomiko Metals Inc. (TSX.V: LMR) disclosed the resignation of Robert Boisjoli from the position of Chief Financial Officer (CFO), effective April 10, 2026. Belinda Labatte, Executive Chair of the Board of Directors, will serve as interim CFO until a permanent replacement is found. Lomiko Metals Inc. is known for its mineral investments, specifically in the advanced La Loutre graphite development project.
Some US officials: We're concerned Iran will use the break in fighting to reconstitute some of its missile arsenal - WSJ.

data.title: Keller Postman Secures $70 Million in Verdicts for All Four Plaintiffs in Historic Abbott Formula Trial
data.description: In Chicago on April 10, 2026, Keller Postman successfully won a jury verdict amounting to $70 million for four infants who developed necrotizing enterocolitis (NEC) after consuming Similac Special Care. The responsible party, Abbott Laboratories, the manufacturer of the formula, was found liable in the case.

data.title: Khoros Launches Iris® AI: Your Messenger Across Every Brand Channel
data.description: In Austin, Texas on April 10, 2026, Khoros revealed Iris® AI, a cutting-edge social media management and brand care platform following its acquisition by IgniteTech less than a year ago. Iris® AI integrates social listening, publishing, engagement, and analytics functions into one advanced AI-native platform, streamlining operations for businesses.
